# Step 01 — baseline (finalized)

Pre-existing step in this handoff fixture. The mid-pipeline runner
should detect this and skip intake.

## Findings

Baseline OLS fit on the synthetic dataset. R² = 0.72; residuals
heteroskedastic — flagged for the next step (stratified sub-analysis).
